name: Machine Elves
notes: Small/fast entities that 'construct' or manipulate reality.

name: Mantis / Insectoid Clinicians
notes: Insectoid beings performing 'adjustments' or examinations.

name: Jester / Trickster
notes: Comedic/taunting presence that destabilizes certainty.

name: Hat Man / Shadow Watcher
notes: Dark silhouette watcher; overlaps sleep-paralysis folklore.

name: Mother Gaia
notes: Singular-feeling nurturing presence; total compassion.

name: The Waiting Room / Antechamber
notes: Transitional staging space before breakthrough.

name: Palace / Cathedral UI
notes: Vast ornate non-euclidean architecture; awe-heavy.

name: The Void / White Light
notes: Objectless state: pure being / blank infinity.

name: The Nursery
notes: Playful room with impossible objects; shown to the traveler.

name: Fractal UI / Infinite Recursion
notes: Recurring visual substrate; 'code-like' recursive structure.

name: Honeycomb / Hex Grid Overlay
notes: Hexagonal tiling overlay perceived as structural layer.

name: Tunnel Vortex
notes: High-speed transition geometry; travel effect.

name: The Pop / Snap
notes: Sudden click that marks a mode switch.

name: Carrier Wave (Audio Rise)
notes: Rising tone/vibration preceding transition; Round 2 will test correlations.

name: Zipper / Fold / Peel
notes: Reality unzips/peels; Round 2 will categorize what's behind it.

name: It is all one
notes: Nondual framing: subject/object collapse.

name: More real than real
notes: Underlayer felt higher fidelity than baseline.

name: Do not be afraid
notes: Often heard/felt at the gate.

name: Just look
notes: Attention is the key.

name: Cosmic Nostalgia
notes: Recognition / returning vibe.

name: Ego Dissolution Terror
notes: Fear spike at boundary crossings.

name: Unconditional Benevolence
notes: Love perceived as an ambient field.

name: Admins / Maintenance Subroutines
notes: Entities framed as autonomous agents maintaining the simulation; react with surprise/annoyance/clinical interest.

name: Janitor of the Void
notes: Hat Man interpreted as a janitor/monitor of dead-space or void state.

name: Colonel Panic Supervisor
notes: Hat Man reinterpreted as a system-inserted supervisor during rendering crashes.

name: Microdemons of Pattern Recognition
notes: Small threat-archetypes generated by overclocked threat detection.

name: Shadow Spiders
notes: Translucent or shadow-black spiders crawling on walls/skin/periphery across deliriance/stimulant psychosis/sleep loss.

name: Library of Lives
notes: A space where users 'browse' alternate versions of their own history; tied to temporal anomalies.

name: Deliriant Basement / Forbidden Zones
notes: Low, heavy layer accessed via deliriants; malevolent architecture and decay-fragments.

name: Trash Cache Directory
notes: Metaphor-space for discarded/decaying fragments of the collective psyche.

name: Buffer Between States
notes: Dissociative buffer-space when physical sensor I/O is cut; gray industrial/cosmic void.

name: K-Hole Kernel Void
notes: Point-of-no-return dissociative space: awareness without body, in vast gray/industrial/cosmic void.

name: BIOS / Power Layer (5-MeO)
notes: 5-MeO-DMT framed as BIOS/power layer: whiteout, nonduality, total reset, no entities.

name: Desktop Environment (N,N-DMT)
notes: N,N-DMT framed as the applications/desktop layer: visuals, entities, messages, waiting room.

name: 3D Language Objects
notes: Users see language as three-dimensional vibrating objects.

name: Synesthetic Syntax
notes: Speaking in colors or 'singing structures' into existence.

name: Raw Data Transfer (Pre-speech)
notes: Witnessing data transfer between neural nodes before translation into human speech.

name: Machine Code of Cognition
notes: Interpretive geometry: cognition perceived as executable code.

name: Dark Ghoul Architecture
notes: Malevolent, heavy architectural motifs in low-layer deliriant states.

name: Glossolalia Burst
notes: Speaking/chanting in 'tongues' or nonhuman phonemes as a transition marker.

name: Forgotten Tongue Recall
notes: Remembering a language never learned; clicking/chirping/liquid telepathy.

name: Chronos Collapse (Eternal Now)
notes: Total cessation of linear time; 'eternal now' state.

name: Lifetime Compression
notes: Subjective centuries/eons within minutes; whole lives/civilizations experienced.

name: Hard Reboot (Zap/Brain Shivers)
notes: Electrical discharges/shivers during onset/offset; baseline handshake re-establishing.

name: Cache Overflow Episode
notes: Muscle-memory scripts execute without physical hardware; produces phantom interactions.

name: Phantom Object Loop
notes: Looping interaction with objects that aren’t there (e.g., cigarettes).

name: Foreign Object Sensation
notes: Feeling of a chip/implant/parasite inserted or removed (often with mantis clinicians).

name: Information = Matter
notes: In the underlayer, information and matter are identical.

name: Communication Is The Thing
notes: Communication is not representation; it is the thing.

name: The Brain Is a Terminal
notes: Reframe: the underlayer is not inside the head; the brain is a terminal.

name: Molecule = Login Credential
notes: Different substances grant different access levels (UI vs root vs trash).

name: Unauthorized Intruder
notes: User presence in back-end framed as unauthorized access; admins respond accordingly.
